text:
Hi,
 
 this is what Dmitry wrote to me:
 On Mon, Jul 10, 2006 at 05:07:03PM +0300, Dmitry A. Yanko wrote:
 > If you have tested it, i have no objections.
 
 So I think it's ok to commit it.

 Mit freundlichem Gruß,
 With best regards,
 
 Simon Olofsson
